toolbar.fixOrphans: Repair all Layer 2 orphan sessions (latestRootBlobId is empty string). store.db is auto-backed-up.

empty.noSessions: No sessions yet. Click the refresh button to rescan.
empty.noMatch: No sessions match the current search.

search.placeholder: Search by session name / project / content

tree.selectSessionHint: ← Select a session on the left

detail.selectSessionHint: ← Select a session on the left

actions.deleteTitle: Delete session (optional L1 / L2 / L3; quit Cursor first for L3)

syncBanner.missingBoth: Neither side can see this session
syncBanner.missingL2: cursor-agent can't see this session (missing Layer 2)
syncBanner.missingL3: Desktop Sidebar can't see this session (missing Layer 3)
syncBanner.hintL2: After filling Layer 2, cursor-agent --resume will be able to enter.
syncBanner.hintL3: After filling Layer 3, Cursor Desktop Sidebar will display it.
syncBanner.refreshL3: Layer 3 content is stale (L2 enrichment available)
syncBanner.hintRefreshL3: Sidebar loads after the first inject, but assistant text may still be [REDACTED] or images missing. Quit Cursor first, then click Refill Layer 3.
syncBanner.refreshL2: Layer 2 content is stale (L3 enrichment available)
syncBanner.hintRefreshL2: cursor-agent --resume may show an empty conversation. Close any running agent for this session, then click Refill Layer 2.

brokenBanner.hint: cursor-agent --resume may fail on this session. Click "Repair Layer 2" to auto-fill latestRootBlobId (a .backup is kept).
brokenBanner.title: Scans all chats/<md5>/<uuid>/store.db and fills latestRootBlobId when it's empty. Auto-backed-up.

deleteDialog.title: Delete session
deleteDialog.body: About to delete session {{uuid}}… from disk. Select at least one layer. L3 soft-delete matches Desktop sidebar delete (archive + purge bubbles) — fully quit Cursor first.
deleteDialog.layerL3Note: Soft delete: sidebar isArchived + remove bubbleId/checkpointId rows, keep composerData. Fully quit Cursor Desktop first.
deleteDialog.running: Cursor / cursor-agent is running (process count: {{count}}). Please close it and retry — the "Confirm delete" button is disabled.

message.title: Conversation
message.emptyWithPath: The JSONL for this session was found, but no parseable conversation bubbles (possibly an empty session).
message.emptyNoPath: This session was not found in Layer 1 JSONL. Layer 2/3 only — the conversation content is not available.

conflicts.title: Conflict resolution
conflicts.description: When two devices edit the same session at the same time during cross-device sync, entries appear below for you to review.
conflicts.noneHint: Cross-device sync looks healthy — nothing needs your attention.
